zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance Hamerton於大約1477年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Sir George Hammerton28歲，母親Elizabeth Moore39歲。她和William Frost至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1570年12月5日在英國英格蘭素福爾可享年94歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾費亞黑斯東。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance Hamerton于大约1477年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Sir George Hammerton28岁，母亲Elizabeth Moore39岁。她和William Frost至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1570年12月5日在英国英格兰素福爾可享年94岁，埋葬在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾費亞黑斯東。

nameMeanings.name: Hamerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Hammerton
meanings: English: habitational name, usually from Hammerton Green (Yorkshire) and occasionally perhaps from Hamerton (Huntingdonshire), each of which probably derives from Old English hamor, denoting some sort of plant such as hammer-wort, + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Constance Hamerton was born about 1477, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir George Hammerton, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth Moore, was 39. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with William Frost. She died on 5 December 1570, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 94, and was buried in Featherstone, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance Hamerton est née environ 1477, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir George Hammerton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Moore, avait 39 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec William Frost. Elle est décédée le 5 décembre 1570, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterrée à Featherstone, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Featherstone, Metropolitan Borough of Wa: Featherstone, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Constance Hamerton um 1477 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir George Hammerton 28 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Moore 39. Sie hatte mit William Frost mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Dezember 1570 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Featherstone, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Hamerton è nata il circa 1477 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir George Hammerton, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Moore, aveva 39 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con William Frost. Morì il 5 dicembre 1570, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 94 anni, e fu sepolta a Featherstone, West Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance Hamertonが約1477年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir George Hammertonは28歳，母Elizabeth Mooreは39歳であった。彼女はWilliam Frostとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1570年12月5日にイギリスイギリススフォルクで94歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアフエアスエルストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance Hamerton(이)가 대략 1477년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir George Hammerton(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Moore(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 William Frost(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1570년 12월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 피더스톤에 묻혔다.

Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com William Frost. Ela faleceu em 5 de dezembro de 1570, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 94 anos, e foi sepultada em Featherstone, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance Hamerton родилась около 1477 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir George Hammerton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Moore, 39. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от William Frost. Она умерла 5 декабря 1570 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 94 лет и была похоронена в местности фитирстоун, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
